/usr/bin/cc -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,my_custom_msgs_s__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.cpython-38-aarch64-linux-gnu.so -o rosidl_generator_py/my_custom_msgs/my_custom_msgs_s__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.cpython-38-aarch64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/my_custom_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c__pyext.dir/rosidl_generator_py/my_custom_msgs/_my_custom_msgs_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/data/python_projects/autonomous_driving/driving/ros_node/my_custom_msgs/build/my_custom_msgs/rosidl_generator_py/my_custom_msgs:/data/python_projects/autonomous_driving/driving/ros_node/my_custom_msgs/build/my_custom_msgs:/opt/ros/galactic/lib: rosidl_generator_py/my_custom_msgs/libmy_custom_msgs__python.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.8.so libmy_custom_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so libmy_custom_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/galactic/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/galactic/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/galactic/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/galactic/lib/librcpputils.so libmy_custom_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/galactic/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/galactic/lib/librcutils.so -ldl /opt/ros/galactic/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so
